LanguageData.BasicMechtech.description: Unlocks the secrets of pre-war RobCo robotics. Required for all further RobCo robot research.
LanguageData.BasicMechtech.label: Civilian RobCo Circuitry
LanguageData.HighMechtech.description: Unlocks advanced RobCo robot types and upgrades.
LanguageData.HighMechtech.label: Advanced General Atomic Cybernetics
LanguageData.RobCo_OS.description: Reverse-engineer the recovered RobCo operating system and adapt it for use in a modern mechanitor network. This is required to deploy RobCo's Securitron line and the heaviest RobCo war machines.
LanguageData.RobCo_OS.label: RobCo OS
LanguageData.StandardMechtech.description: Enables construction and control of standard RobCo robots.
LanguageData.StandardMechtech.label: Military RobCo Circuitry
LanguageData.UltraMechtech.description: Unlocks the most powerful and secret RobCo robots.
LanguageData.UltraMechtech.label: Secret General Atomics Design Documents
